content: K2, what is the day after tomorrow?

<TOOK_NOTE>
The human asked for the day after tomorrow.
</TOOK_NOTE>

To find the day after tomorrow without guessing or calculating it myself, I will use the get_date tool to add 2 days from today's date.

<OUTPUT><TOOL>get_date(2)</TOOL></OUTPUT>

<TOOK_NOTE>
The human asked for the day after tomorrow.
</TOOK_NOTE>

To find the day after tomorrow without guessing or calculating it myself, I will use the get_date tool to add 2 days from today's date.

<OUTPUT><TOOL>get_date(2)</TOOL></OUTPUT>

> 🤖 **Observed:** RESULT: Monday, April 27, 2026

The day after tomorrow is Monday, April 27, 2026.
